title: phleum pratense subsp. vulgare
intro: Phleum pratense subsp. vulgare, also known as common timothy grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of common timothy grass include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Common timothy grass can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
